Published09:00 27 Jul 2024 BST

Updated17:18 29 Jul 2024 BST

The 2024 Paris Olympics are finally here which means it's that time when we can all put our differences aside and come together as one nation, especially after Euro 2024!

With a schedule full of elite-level sport, Team GB will be looking to start their Olympics in style with many British medal hopes to come over the next two weeks in Paris and across France.

Here, we'll be keeping track of all the gold, silver and bronze medals won throughout the tournament so you don't have to get the calculator out.

Gold medals:2

Silver medals:4

Bronze medals:3

Total:9

Position on medal table:7th

World records:0
